category_sources: source_facts.description says livekit-cli is a command-line interface to LiveKit.
display_name_sources: Official LiveKit documentation names the tool LiveKit CLI and notes the lk command.
docs_sources: Official LiveKit documentation has a dedicated LiveKit CLI reference page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/livekit/livekit-cli, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies the LiveKit CLI; official LiveKit CLI docs describe setup, project management, app templates, and agent commands.
